headline: Mastering the Essentials: Skills, Data Tips & Tools for Consultants

stories.title: Structured thinking is lowkey the most important skill consultants need right now
stories.summary: Problem-solving beats everything else in consulting—it's about breaking complex issues into pieces, testing with data, and letting evidence guide you instead of jumping to conclusions.
stories.takeaway: Stop guessing and start structuring. Master MECE frameworks and issue trees to solve client problems like a pro.

stories.title: ChatGPT for Excel just dropped and it's literally a game-changer for financial modeling
stories.summary: Use ChatGPT directly in Excel to build, update, and run scenario analysis in plain language—no more manual formula writing. Teams can describe what they need, and GPT-5.4 handles the heavy lifting.
stories.takeaway: Describe your analysis in plain English and let AI write the formulas. Less time on syntax, more time on decisions.

stories.title: Productive is the all-in-one tool consultants actually want (time tracking + billing + profitability in one)
stories.summary: Tired of juggling project management, time tracking, invoicing, and financials separately? Productive unifies everything—track billable hours, manage resources, monitor profit margins by client, and generate 50+ custom reports.
stories.takeaway: Stop context-switching between tools. One platform for projects, time, money, and insights = less chaos, better margins.

watchNext.title: The 2026 Consulting Skills Blueprint: Everything McKinsey, BCG & Bain Look For
watchNext.why: Get clarity on what top firms actually want—beyond the buzzwords. Includes soft skills, analytical rigor, and how to interview like you've been doing this for years.

watchNext.title: AI Tools for Excel Data Analysis in 2026: Julius AI, Powerdrill & More
watchNext.why: Lowkey the future is AI-powered analysis. This breaks down which tools actually save time vs. hype. Julius AI and Powerdrill Bloom are worth the deep dive.
